events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the photo evidence is unusable (packaging + glare obscuring the identifying mark and connection details), I marked this **needs_more_info** rather than pass/fail — MSS SP-58 compliance can't be judged without a legible tag and visible connection detail. Findings call for re-photographing the support with packaging removed and the ID tag legible before it can be signed off.
